title: rubus hirtus var. blandus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. blandus, also known as the thistle raspberry, is a variant of the wild raspberry plant. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. blandus include potential cardiovascular and anti-cancer properties, as well as its ability to support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety in human use.
